title: thymus serpyllum var. linearifolius
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. linearifolius, also known as the wild thyme or creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading, and woody-stemmed perennial plant that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to combat infections and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. linearifolius include its ability to improve respiratory health, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Thymus serpyllum var. linearifolius can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it can also be added to food and used as a natural insect repellent.
